<table>
  <tr>
    <td><label for="fn">First name</label></td>
    <td><input type="text" id="fn" name="first_name"></td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
    <td><label for="ln">Last name</label></td>
    <td><input type="text" id="ln" name="last_name"></td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
    <td><label for="em">Email</label></td>
    <td><input type="email" id="em" name="email"></td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
    <td><label for="co">Country</label></td>
    <td>
      <select id="co" name="country">
        <option value="">--Select--</option>
        <option value="sg">Singapore</option>
        <option value="us">United States</option>
      </select>
    </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
    <td colspan="2"><button type="submit">Submit</button></td>
  </tr>
</table>
